# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a complete Azure web application stack (App Service, SQL Database, Storage Account). Focus on core resources and connectivity. We'll add diagnostic settings and monitoring in the next iteration after we verify the basic setup works.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Location for all resources."
      }
    },
    "appName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The name of the app service."
      }
    },
    "sqlServerName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The name of the SQL server."
      }
    },
    "databaseName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The name of the database."
      }
    },
    "storageAccountName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The name of the storage account."
      }
    },
    "adminUsername": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The administrator username for the SQL server and the App Service."
      }
    },
    "adminPassword": {
      "type": "secureString",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The administrator password for the SQL server and the App Service."
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "sqlServerAdminLogin": "[parameters('adminUsername')]",
    "sqlServerAdminLoginPassword": "[parameters('adminPassword')]",
    "storageAccountType": "Standard_LRS"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/sites",
      "apiVersion": "2021-02-01",
      "name": "[parameters('appName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "kind": "app",
      "properties": {
        "serverFarmId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', parameters('appName'))]"
      },
      "resources": [
        {
          "type": "config",
          "apiVersion": "2021-02-01",
          "name": "web",
          "dependsOn": [
            "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('appName'))]"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "appSettings": [
              {
                "name": "ConnectionStrings:DefaultConnection",
                "value": "[concat('Server=tcp:', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases', variables('sqlServerName'), parameters('databaseName')), '2019-06-01').fullyQualifiedDomainName, ',1433;Initial Catalog=', parameters('databaseName'), ';User ID=', variables('sqlServerAdminLogin'), '@', variables('sqlServerName'), ';Password=', variables('sqlServerAdminLoginPassword'), ';Encrypt=True;TrustServerCertificate=False;Connection Timeout=30;')]"
              },
              {
                "name": "AzureWebJobsStorage",
                "value": "[concat('DefaultEndpointsProtocol=https;AccountName=', parameters('storageAccountName'), ';AccountKey=', listKeys(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName')), '2019-06-01').keys[0].value, ';EndpointSuffix=core.windows.net')]"
              }
            ]
          }
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers",
      "apiVersion": "2019-06-01",
      "name": "[parameters('sqlServerName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "administratorLogin": "[variables('sqlServerAdminLogin')]",
        "administratorLoginPassword": "[variables('sqlServerAdminLoginPassword')]"
      },
      "resources": [
        {
          "type": "databases",
          "apiVersion": "2019-06-01",
          "name": "[parameters('databaseName')]",
          "dependsOn": [
            "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "collation": "SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS",
            "maxSizeBytes": 2684354560
          }
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts",
      "apiVersion": "2019-06-01",
      "name": "[parameters('storageAccountName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "kind": "StorageV2",
      "sku": {
        "name": "[variables('storageAccountType')]"
      },
      "resources": [
        {
          "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices",
          "apiVersion": "2019-06-01",
          "name": "[concat(parameters('storageAccountName'), '/default')]",
          "dependsOn": [
            "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "publicAccess": "Blob"
          }
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks",
      "apiVersion": "2019-04-01",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('appName'), 'VNet')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "addressSpace": {
          "addressPrefixes": [
            "10.0.0.0/16"
          ]
        }
      },
      "resources": [
        {
          "type": "subnets",
          "apiVersion": "2019-04-01",
          "name": "[concat(parameters('appName'), 'Subnet')]",
          "dependsOn": [
            "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', concat(parameters('appName'), 'VNet'))]"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "addressPrefix": "10.0.0.0/24",
            "serviceEndpoints": []
          }
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/serverfarms",
      "apiVersion": "2021-02-01",
      "name": "[parameters('appName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "kind": "appserviceplan",
      "properties": {
        "name": "[parameters('appName')]",
        "numberOfWorkers": 1,
        "reserved": false,
        "resourceGroup": "[resourceGroup().name]",
        "storageAccountRequired": true
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/virtualNetworkRules",
      "apiVersion": "2019-06-01",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/', parameters('appName'))]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]",
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', concat(parameters('appName'), 'VNet', parameters('appName'), 'Subnet'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "virtualNetworkSubnetId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', concat(parameters('appName'), 'VNet', parameters('appName'), 'Subnet'))]",
        "ignoreMissingVNetServiceEndpoint": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules",
      "apiVersion": "2019-06-01",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/', 'AllowAllWindowsAzureIps')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "startIpAddress": "0.0.0.0",
        "endIpAddress": "255.255.255.255"
      }
    }
  ]
}
